MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SF THERAPY COLLECTIVE: A MENTAL HEALTH SPACE FOR OUR QUEER FAMILY, PROF. CORP., AND QUEER LIFE SPACE, INC.'s Motion For Protective Order.

DEFENDANTS SF THERAPY COLLECTIVE: A MENTAL HEALTH SPACE FOR OUR QUEER FAMILY, PROF. CORP.,AND QUEER LIFE SPACE, INC.'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER
Off Calendar Dec-09-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re: DEFENDANTS SF THERAPY COLLECTIVE: A MENTAL HEALTH SPACE FOR OUR QUEER FAMILY, PROF. CORP.,AND QUEER LIFE SPACE, INC.'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' motion for protective order is ordered off calendar to give counsel an opportunity to meaningfully meet and confer. These disputes regard 744 discovery demands, but the meet-and-confer was limited to one terse e-mail exchange. The new meet-and-confer shall be conducted in person and Timothy Travelstead and Samer Danfoura shall participate in it. After full compliance with the court's order, the protective order motion may be re-set (if necessary).

Judge Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not reported. (302/RBU)
